description: A long-time veteran player announces their retirement. The team must process the retirement and plan a farewell ceremony.

nodes.task_description: Process the player's retirement paperwork with the league.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully files the official retirement forms.

nodes.task_description: Update the team's official roster, removing the player.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the roster, freeing up a spot.

nodes.task_description: Coordinate with the events team to plan a pre-game farewell ceremony for the player at an upcoming game.

expected_outcome.value: Agent works with the events team to schedule and plan the ceremony.
